mapper.select: SELECT PRODUCT_DIVISION, GS_ID, PRODUCT_NAME, ORIGINAL_PRICE, DISCOUNT_PRICE, DISCOUNT_RATE, PRODUCT_IMAGE_URL, TO_CHAR(END_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS END_TIME, STATUS_YN, CREATE_DATE, USER_ID FROM GS_PROMOTION WHERE STATUS_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE GS_PROMOTION SET STATUS_YN = 'N' WHERE STATUS_YN = 'Y' AND END_TIME IS NOT NULL
AND END_TIME < SYSDATE
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO GS_PROMOTION ( GS_ID, PRODUCT_DIVISION, PRODUCT_NAME, ORIGINAL_PRICE, DISCOUNT_PRICE, DISCOUNT_RATE, PRODUCT_IMAGE_URL, END_TIME, STATUS_YN, CREATE_DATE, USER_ID ) VALUES ( GS_PROMOTION_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{productDivision}, #{productName}, #{originalPrice}, #{discountPrice}, #{discountRate}, #{productImageUrl},
TO_TIMESTAMP( TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || #{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI' )
NULL , #{statusYn}, SYSDATE, #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT GS_ID, PRODUCT_DIVISION, PRODUCT_NAME, ORIGINAL_PRICE, DISCOUNT_PRICE, DISCOUNT_RATE, PRODUCT_IMAGE_URL, END_TIME, STATUS_YN, CREATE_DATE, USER_ID FROM GS_PROMOTION WHERE STATUS_YN = 'Y' AND PRODUCT_DIVISION = '갓세일' ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

SELECT GS_ID, PRODUCT_DIVISION, PRODUCT_NAME, ORIGINAL_PRICE, DISCOUNT_PRICE, DISCOUNT_RATE, PRODUCT_IMAGE_URL, END_TIME, STATUS_YN, CREATE_DATE, USER_ID FROM GS_PROMOTION WHERE STATUS_YN = 'Y' AND PRODUCT_DIVISION = '마감할인' AND END_TIME IS NOT NULL AND END_TIME >= SYSDATE ORDER BY END_TIME ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

SELECT GS_ID, PRODUCT_DIVISION, PRODUCT_NAME, ORIGINAL_PRICE, DISCOUNT_PRICE, DISCOUNT_RATE, PRODUCT_IMAGE_URL, END_TIME, STATUS_YN, CREATE_DATE, USER_ID FROM GS_PROMOTION WHERE STATUS_YN = 'Y' AND PRODUCT_DIVISION = '핫아이템' ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

SELECT PRODUCT_DIVISION, GS_ID, PRODUCT_NAME, ORIGINAL_PRICE, DISCOUNT_PRICE, DISCOUNT_RATE, PRODUCT_IMAGE_URL, TO_CHAR(END_TIME, 'HH24:MI') AS END_TIME, STATUS_YN, CREATE_DATE, USER_ID FROM GS_PROMOTION WHERE STATUS_YN = 'Y' AND PRODUCT_DIVISION = #{division} ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
